title: Quentin Tarantino interview: 'I'm shutting your butt down!'

markers.name: loaded_language
markers.excerpt: laying waste to a genocidal white racist class in the institution of slavery
markers.explanation: The speaker uses emotionally charged, morally absolute phrasing ('laying waste,' 'genocidal white racist class') to frame the antagonists, intensifying the rhetorical impact beyond neutral description.

markers.name: pejorative_framing
markers.explanation: Characterizing the slaveholding class with a stacked pejorative label frames an entire group in the most damning terms, shaping audience perception through wording rather than argument.
